acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.params: Close parameters settled by authorized relayer.

params.marginVault_: MarginVault address for margin lock/unlock operations.
params.riskConfig_: RiskConfig address for market leverage checks.

increasePosition((address,bytes32,uint25.details: Reverts while liquidation grace protection is active so users cannot expand risk during the rescue window.

params.params: Increase parameters settled by authorized relayer.

openPosition((address,bytes32,bool,uint2.details: Reverts if user already has an active position in the same market.

params.params: Open position parameters settled by authorized relayer.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.params: Reduce parameters settled by authorized relayer.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.isAuthorized: True to authorize, false to revoke.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

addMargin(bytes32,uint256).notice: Adds isolated margin to an existing open position without changing position size.

closePosition((address,bytes32,uint256)).notice: Closes an open position and unlocks all remaining isolated margin.

constructor.notice: Deploys PositionManager with owner and module dependencies.

getPosition(address,bytes32).notice: Returns the latest authoritative position state for a user and market.

increasePosition((address,bytes32,uint25.notice: Increases size and optional margin of an existing open position.

markLiquidated(address,bytes32,address,u.notice: Marks an open position as liquidated.

openPosition((address,bytes32,bool,uint2.notice: Opens a new isolated position for a user and market.

reducePosition((address,bytes32,uint256,.notice: Reduces part of an open position and unlocks proportional margin.

setInsuranceController(address).notice: Sets insurance controller used for optional position insurance hooks.

setLiquidationEngine(address).notice: Sets the liquidation engine used to refresh liquidation protection state after margin top-ups.

setRelayer(address,bool).notice: Sets relayer authorization for off-chain execution settlement.
